name: Mint LP Position
description: Create a new Uniswap V3 LP position with a specified price range
detail: Mints a new concentrated liquidity position as an ERC-721 NFT. Requires the token pair, fee tier, tick range (must be spacing-aligned), and desired token amounts. Use calculate-range to get properly aligned ticks, and compute-optimal-amounts to determine the correct token ratio. Returns the new position's tokenId.

token0.description: Address of token0 (must be the lower address of the pair)

token1.description: Address of token1 (must be the higher address of the pair)

tickLower.description: Lower tick boundary (must be aligned to pool tick spacing)

tickUpper.description: Upper tick boundary (must be aligned to pool tick spacing)

amount0Desired.description: Desired amount of token0 to deposit

amount1Desired.description: Desired amount of token1 to deposit

recipient.description: Address to receive the position NFT

examples.input: Create a new WETH/USDC LP position with ±5% range
